description_long: This helmet features a robust, rounded shell with a glossy, metallic gold exterior and a prominent black central section. Both sides of the helmet display a striking, multi-colored stripe pattern in horizontal bands of red, orange, blue, green, and purple, adding a vibrant, modern aesthetic. The front opening is wide and dark, suggesting a full-face coverage design, while the rear and sides are reinforced with angular, molded sections for added protection. The surface is smooth and reflective, with no visible vents or external attachments. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the helmet appears to lack a visible retention system or visor mechanism. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban use and personal safety.
description: A glossy gold helmet with a black central section and colorful horizontal stripes on the sides, featuring a smooth, modern design and full-face coverage.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the gold shell, black top, and a vivid rainbow stripe pattern along the side.
description_view_1: Top view highlighting the wide black central section flanked by symmetrical colored stripes on both sides.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same gold shell and colorful side stripes.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the large, dark face opening and the helmet's smooth, rounded contours.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract horizontal rainbow stripes on both sides over a gold and black base
